mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_CONSENT ( consent_id, user_id, consent_level, consent_given, is_active, created_at ) VALUES ( USER_CONSENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{consentLevel}, #{consentGiven}, #{isActive}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_CONSENT WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND consent_level = #{consentLevel} AND is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY created_at DESC, consent_id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM USER_CONSENT WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY consent_level ASC, created_at DESC, consent_id DESC
